name: Hope Cannon I
description:
A heavy bowgun made specifically
for the expedition. Each part was
designed to aid high-power shots.

name: Hope Cannon II
description:
A heavy bowgun made specifically
for the expedition. Each part was
designed to aid high-power shots.

name: Hope Cannon III
description:
A heavy bowgun made specifically
for the expedition. Each part was
designed to aid high-power shots.

name: Hope Cannon IV
description:
A heavy bowgun made specifically
for the expedition. Each part was
designed to aid high-power shots.

name: Hope Cannon V
description:
A heavy bowgun made specifically
for the expedition. Each part was
designed to aid high-power shots.

name: Chata Sheller I
description:
A Chatacabra heavy bowgun that
features a large-caliber magazine
that emphasizes firepower.

name: Chata Sheller II
description:
A Chatacabra heavy bowgun that
features a large-caliber magazine
that emphasizes firepower.

name: Chata Sheller III
description:
A Chatacabra heavy bowgun that
features a large-caliber magazine
that emphasizes firepower.

name: Chata Sheller IV
description:
A Chatacabra heavy bowgun that
features a large-caliber magazine
that emphasizes firepower.

name: Power Stinger I
description:
A Congalala heavy bowgun that
places emphasis on handling,
making it a reliable choice for a
good hunt.

name: Power Stinger II
description:
A Congalala heavy bowgun that
places emphasis on handling,
making it a reliable choice for a
good hunt.

name: Wild Stinger
description:
An upgraded Power Stinger.
Reliable in any situation, it takes
the "dire" out of "predicament."

name: Uth Dalgap I
description:
An Uth Duna heavy bowgun that
puts cannons to shame with its
powerful, high-compression
rounds.

name: Uth Dalgap II
description:
An Uth Duna heavy bowgun that
puts cannons to shame with its
powerful, high-compression
rounds.

name: Uth Dalgap III
description:
An Uth Duna heavy bowgun that
puts cannons to shame with its
powerful, high-compression
rounds.

name: Dalgap-of-the-Waves
description:
An upgraded Uth Dalgap. With
every veil flutter, this piscine
paragon unleashes a cascade
of gunfire.

name: Rompo Sniper I
description:
A Rompopolo bowgun. This
experimental weapon can
expand its range by emitting
a poisonous gas.

name: Rompo Sniper II
description:
A Rompopolo bowgun. This
experimental weapon can
expand its range by emitting
a poisonous gas.

name: Rompo Sniper III
description:
A Rompopolo bowgun. This
experimental weapon can
expand its range by emitting
a poisonous gas.

name: Rompo Latrotox
description:
An upgraded Rompo Sniper.
One hit from this baby will lay
an enemy flat before they even
feel the pain.

name: Ner Bustergun I
description:
A Heavy Bowgun that leverages
the Nerscylla's stretchy
materials to achieve good
handling and firepower.

name: Ner Bustergun II
description:
A Heavy Bowgun that leverages
the Nerscylla's stretchy
materials to achieve good
handling and firepower.

name: Ner Bustergun III
description:
A Heavy Bowgun that leverages
the Nerscylla's stretchy
materials to achieve good
handling and firepower.

name: Buster Blaster
description:
An upgraded Ner Bustergun.
Much like the Nerscylla, its well-
aimed strikes eviscerate prey.

name: Nu Muneo I
description:
A Nu Udra heavy bowgun as
fearsome as its namesake.
To even hold its grotesque
barrel saps one's sanity.

name: Nu Muneo II
description:
A Nu Udra heavy bowgun as
fearsome as its namesake.
To even hold its grotesque
barrel saps one's sanity.

name: Abaddonian Muneo
description:
An upgraded Nu Muneo that
writhes revoltingly, its darkness
so vast that misfortune bows
to it.

name: Jin Dhaphal I
description:
A heavy bowgun with a cooling
apparatus born of Jin Dahaad's
forbidding, icy clime.

name: Precipice Malmiam
description:
An upgraded Jin Dhaphal.
Freed from its eternal mountain
prison, this blizzard will not be
quieted again.

name: Iron Assault I
description:
A simple bowgun that's perfect
for beginners.

name: Iron Assault II
description:
A simple bowgun that's perfect
for beginners.

name: Iron Assault III
description:
A simple bowgun that's perfect
for beginners.

name: Steel Assault
description:
It may look like a simple
bowgun, but in the hands
of an expert, watch out!

name: Bone Shooter I
description:
Though cheaply constructed, this
bowgun is surprisingly reliable.
It also makes an excellent base
for further upgrades.

name: Bone Shooter II
description:
Though cheaply constructed, this
bowgun is surprisingly reliable.
It also makes an excellent base
for further upgrades.

name: Bone Shooter III
description:
Though cheaply constructed, this
bowgun is surprisingly reliable.
It also makes an excellent base
for further upgrades.

name: Bone Shooter IV
description:
Though cheaply constructed, this
bowgun is surprisingly reliable.
It also makes an excellent base
for further upgrades.

name: Heavy Shooter
description:
An upgraded Bone Shooter,
beloved even by veteran
hunters.

name: Yian Kut-Ku Cannon I
description:
A high-powered, high-caliber
Yian Kut-Ku Heavy Bowgun.
It makes liberal use of fire-
resistant materials.

name: Yian Kut-Ku Cannon II
description:
A high-powered, high-caliber
Yian Kut-Ku Heavy Bowgun.
It makes liberal use of fire-
resistant materials.

name: Super Kut-Ku Cannon
description:
An upgraded Yian Kut-Ku
Cannon. Its output has been
maximized to incinerate foes
in a blink.

name: Tankmage I
description:
A Gypceros heavy bowgun that
leverages the elastic materials for
superior grip and stability.

name: Tankmage II
description:
A Gypceros heavy bowgun that
leverages the elastic materials for
superior grip and stability.

name: Tanksorcerer
description:
An upgraded Tankmage with
drastically improved firepower
that could take down a whole
citadel.

name: Queen's Longfire I
description:
A Rathian heavy bowgun that
delivers fire resistance and
the consistent, hard-hitting
firepower hunters love.

name: Queen's Longfire II
description:
A Rathian heavy bowgun that
delivers fire resistance and
the consistent, hard-hitting
firepower hunters love.

name: Queen's Farflier
description:
The upgraded form of the
Queen's Longfire, a sleek-
barreled technical marvel
that only veterans can wield.

name: Grounding Fulgur I
description:
A Guardian Fulgur Anjanath heavy
bowgun. Only one able to tame
its brutality through reason can
wield it.

name: Fulgurblast Guardiana
description:
An upgraded Grounding Fulgur.
Its savage urges thwart reason
and will destroy an overeager
wielder.

name: Sayyad Cannon I
description:
A magnificently gilded Seregios
heavy bowgun. With fury against
injustice and bullets of gold, the
rebellious soul strikes true.

name: Insurrection Cannon
description:
An upgraded Sayyad Cannon.
It'll continue firing as long as
the revolutionary spirit survives.

name: Gravios Howl I
description:
A massive Gravios bowgun that
shakes environs with each
potent blast from its gigantic
muzzle.

name: Gravios Gigahowl
description:
An upgraded Gravios Howl. Its
raucous blasts thunder through
the air, shattering the
atmosphere.

name: Tödlicher Abzug I
description:
A Gore Magala Heavy Bowgun
that pronounces black curses
upon prey, devouring them
from within.

name: Ableben Abzug
description:
An enhanced Tödlicher Abzug.
Its black curses have doomed
countless opponents.

name: G. Veldian Tormentum I
description:
A heavy bowgun made from
Guardian spoils. Cold and
weighty, it quiets the pulse
and preserves composure.

name: G. Veldian Tormentum II
description:
A heavy bowgun made from
Guardian spoils. Cold and
weighty, it quiets the pulse
and preserves composure.

name: G. Aeternal Palamedes
description:
An upgraded G. Veldian
Tormentum. Even after
the last shot is fired, its
soul yearns to take life.

name: Veldian Tormentum I
description:
An Arkveld heavy bowgun.
Famously, a knight of an
ancient impregnable city
used it to repel intruders.

name: Artian Sheller I
description:
A weapon assembled from
unearthed fragments. The
arm-like parts seem to
increase the force of rounds.

name: Artian Sheller II
description:
A weapon assembled from
unearthed fragments. The
arm-like parts seem to
increase the force of rounds.

name: Greifen
description:
An ancient weapon with latent
potential. Fully restored, its
barrel is a fount of destruction.

name: Zoh Mitran I
description:
A Zoh Shia heavy bowgun
that leaves cruel destruction
in its wake.

name: Blazing Mitran
description:
Mitran harketh from on high:
Thou who seekest the covenant,
may thy muzzle declare thy
judgment.

name: Esperanza Cannon
description:
A fully field-tested Hope
Cannon. Its powerful, diverse
ammo lights the world and
banishes despair.

name: Shrouded Muktana
description:
An upgraded Chata Sheller with
a reexamined design, yielding
firepower that can obliterate
boulders.

name: Aeternal Palamedes
description:
An upgraded Veldian Tormentum.
In service to its knight, it picked
off all threats with eerie precision.

name: Cirrus Blaster I
description:
A bowgun created by an old
warrior tribe. Its blast can
dispel even thick, dark fog.

name: Mountainous Roar
description:
A Cirrus Blaster upgrade.
Its shots leave behind a
watery trail.

name: Lagia Blitz I
description:
A weapon made of Lagiacrus parts.
The electrified barrel prevents
bullets from losing velocity.

name: Thunderblitz Cannon
description:
An upgraded Lagia Blitz.
Concentrated electrical
energy gives each shot
great destructive force.

name: Trembling Hels
description:
A once blissful memory that
thirsts for potential, in lieu of the
freedom of pain it will never know.

name: Trembling Hels
description:
A once blissful memory that
thirsts for potential, in lieu of the
freedom of pain it will never know.

name: Trembling Hels
description:
A once blissful memory that
thirsts for potential, in lieu of the
freedom of pain it will never know.
